---
title: "Services"
---

## Advancing Clinical Trials Through Expert Support

1. [Trial Methodology Support](initiatives/methods.qmd)
2. [ACT-CTU Protocol Review Sessions](initiatives/protocol-review-session.qmd)
3. [Nagano Support](initiatives/nagano.qmd)
4. [Health Canada Regulatory Submission Assistance](initiatives/HealthCanada.qmd)
5. [Connect with Expert Staff to Run Your Trial](initiatives/key-shared-staff.qmd)
6. [Exapanding Trial Sites Through the ACT Network](initiatives/act-network.qmd)
7. [Refine Your Recruitment Pitch](initiatives/pitch.qmd)
8. [Connect With a Patient Partner](initiatives/patient-engagement.qmd)
9. [Permission to Contact for Research](initiatives/universal-consent.qmd)
10. [Internal Call for Pilot Studies](initiatives/pilot-studies.qmd)
